---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new feature for AttendIQ
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what feature or enhancement you are proposing.

## 💡 Problem Statement / Rationale
Is your feature request related to a specific problem or inconvenience?
*Example: "I always forget when my lab assignment is due on Fridays..."*

## 🎨 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented, including potential UI placement or interaction flow.

## 🔄 Alternative Options
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🔒 Offline & Architectural Considerations
Does this feature respect AttendIQ's 100% offline-first philosophy? How will data be stored locally in Isar DB?

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, wireframes, or screenshots about the feature request here.
